review: We stopped in for a beer but saw they had a Northern Liberties cheesesteak.  We got to Northern Liberties cheesesteak.  Spoiler alert: it is a roast beef panini.  It is a good roast beef panini.  Nice place.  Very helpful people.  Huge Beer selection.  $7.  There are a lot of reasons to love the Foodery in Northern Liberties.
